calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-11-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Rita Howell.
Robert Perkiss, Esq. for Plaintiff: State Bar of California. Plaintiff's Witness: Tracy McCormick, was present, sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Cheri A. Owen as follows:
Damages $89,949.43
Prejudgment Interest $18,871.50 for a total of $108,820.93.
Judgment signed in open court.
